questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "time limit"?
questions.explanation: "time limit" có nghĩa là "giới hạn thời gian".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "confident"?
questions.explanation: "confident" có nghĩa là "tự tin".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "revise"?
questions.explanation: "revise" có nghĩa là "ôn lại".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "assess"?
questions.explanation: "assess" có nghĩa là "đánh giá".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "accuracy"?
questions.explanation: "accuracy" có nghĩa là "độ chính xác".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "fluency"?
questions.explanation: "fluency" có nghĩa là "sự trôi chảy".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "preparation"?
questions.explanation: "preparation" có nghĩa là "sự chuẩn bị".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "question"?
questions.explanation: "question" có nghĩa là "câu hỏi".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "answer"?
questions.explanation: "answer" có nghĩa là "câu trả lời".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "complete"?
questions.explanation: "complete" có nghĩa là "hoàn thành".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "achieve"?
questions.explanation: "achieve" có nghĩa là "đạt được".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "improve"?
questions.explanation: "improve" có nghĩa là "cải thiện".

questions.question: Choose the best word: Speak with _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Speak with fluency." — từ đúng là "fluency" (sự trôi chảy).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Good _____ is key.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Good preparation is key." — từ đúng là "preparation" (sự chuẩn bị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Read each _____ twice.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Read each question twice." — từ đúng là "question" (câu hỏi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Check your _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Check your answers." — từ đúng là "answer" (câu trả lời).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ all sections.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Complete all sections." — từ đúng là "complete" (hoàn thành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: You can _____ B1.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "You can achieve B1." — từ đúng là "achieve" (đạt được).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I want to _____ my writing.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I want to improve my writing." — từ đúng là "improve" (cải thiện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Work on your _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Work on your weakness." — từ đúng là "weakness" (điểm yếu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Reading is my _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Reading is my strength." — từ đúng là "strength" (điểm mạnh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ during the test.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Focus during the test." — từ đúng là "focus" (tập trung).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ your time well.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Manage your time well." — từ đúng là "manage" (quản lý).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I hope to _____ the exam.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I hope to pass the exam." — từ đúng là "pass" (đỗ/qua).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ studied all night.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: present perfect → past perfect.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If it ___, we will cancel the trip.
questions.explanation: First conditional uses present simple in the if-clause.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The house ___ built last year.
questions.explanation: Passive past simple: was + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I have ___ finished the test.
questions.explanation: 'Just' with present perfect for recent action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ exam of the year.
questions.explanation: Superlative of a short adjective: -est.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: You ___ revise before the exam.
questions.explanation: 'Should' gives advice.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: While I ___, the bell rang.
questions.explanation: Past continuous for an interrupted action.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The man ___ marked the test is strict.
questions.explanation: 'Who' refers to a person.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I think I ___ pass the exam.
questions.explanation: Prediction based on opinion uses 'will'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: English ___ spoken in many countries.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple singular: is + participle.

questions.question: Which English word means "giới hạn thời gian"?
questions.explanation: "giới hạn thời gian" trong tiếng Anh là "time limit".

questions.question: Which English word means "tự tin"?
questions.explanation: "tự tin" trong tiếng Anh là "confident".

questions.question: Which English word means "ôn lại"?
questions.explanation: "ôn lại" trong tiếng Anh là "revise".

questions.question: Which English word means "đánh giá"?
questions.explanation: "đánh giá" trong tiếng Anh là "assess".

questions.question: Which English word means "độ chính xác"?
questions.explanation: "độ chính xác" trong tiếng Anh là "accuracy".

questions.question: Which English word means "sự trôi chảy"?
questions.explanation: "sự trôi chảy" trong tiếng Anh là "fluency".
